page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.t6-c1m4.large is a burstable instance belonging to the ecs.t6 server family. It is built on the KVM hypervisor and powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor with an x86_64 architecture. The server features 2 virtual CPUs mapped to 2 physical cores with 1 thread per core, running at a clock speed of 2.5 GHz. It is equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. No local storage or dedicated GPU hardware is bundled with this instance, and the baseline network bandwidth is rated at 0 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate that this instance operates in the lower performance tiers. In stress-ng testing, the single-core CPU performance scored 1161.28 and multi-core scored 2371.48, both falling into the bottom 25% category. Memory bandwidth tests showed a read-only small block speed of 187.49 GB/sec, while large block read-only and write speeds dropped to 22.38 GB/sec and 19.14 GB/sec respectively. Passmark metrics further reflect these limitations, with a CPU score of 3062.61 and a database operations score of 701.22, placing it in the bottom 10% to 25% of tested hardware.

Due to its burstable CPU allocation and lack of local storage, the ecs.t6-c1m4.large is designed for low-intensity workloads that experience occasional spikes in activity. It is qualitatively positioned as a budget-friendly option for development environments, low-traffic static web serving, and lightweight background tasks. The instance is not suited for sustained high-compute applications, large databases, or memory-intensive operations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.t6-c1m4.large is a burstable, budget-oriented instance within the ecs.t6 family, utilizing the KVM hypervisor. It is configured with an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz, offering 2 vCPUs across 2 physical cores, and 8.0 GB of RAM. The instance does not include local storage or GPU resources, and features a baseline network bandwidth of 0 Gbps. Performance benchmarks place this server in the lower tiers, with a stress-ng single-core score of 1161.28 and a Passmark database operations score of 701.22. Given its burstable CPU allocation and modest memory capacity, this instance is qualitatively cost-effective for low-resource workloads. It is best suited for lightweight applications, development environments, and low-traffic static web serving.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.t6-c1m4.large is a burstable x86_64 instance with 2 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 8.0 GB RAM, and no local storage, designed for low-intensity workloads and budget-conscious development.

tagline: A budget-friendly, burstable virtual server with dual-core Intel processing and eight gigabytes of memory for low-intensity utility workloads.

Equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory and no local storage
Utilizes a burstable CPU allocation model on the KVM hypervisor
Suited for low-traffic static web serving and development environments
